items.title: External navigation safety: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this HTML: Semantic and Accessible Web Documents misconception? Every external link must open a new tab because that is always safer and more accessible.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Do not force a new browsing context by default; when one is required, disclose it and apply the appropriate rel policy.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Do not force a new browsing context by default; when one is required, disclose it and apply the appropriate rel policy.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked HTML: Semantic and Accessible Web Documents correction rather than the documented misconception.

options.text: Do not force a new browsing context by default; when one is required, disclose it and apply the appropriate rel policy.

items.title: External navigation safety: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Use download, target, rel and referrer-related behavior only when justified and disclosed. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating disclosed new-context external link with rel isolation; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted authoring draft. Runtime evidence does not replace independent human standards, pedagogy, accessibility, answer-oracle, and formal-exam review.

hints: Implement the smallest artifact that satisfies the declared observable contract, then check the visible case before considering the hidden boundary.

feedback.correct: The locked authoring verifier observed the declared bounded facet in both visible and hidden cases.
feedback.incorrect: At least one deterministic authoring check failed; inspect the exact artifact, interaction state, viewport, and observable result without assuming hidden-case details.

criteria.description: Passes the visible and hidden deterministic checks for the declared implementation facet in its pinned authoring environment.

privateAuthorNotes: This code item and its oracle are AI-assisted draft material with reviewer=null and examEligibility=false.
